name: Bullet Bridge
description: Unofficial Pushbullet client for sending, receiving, and browsing browser pushes.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.pushbullet.com https://*.pushbulletusercontent.com https://*.pushbulletusercontent2.com https://s3.amazonaws.com https://*.s3.amazonaws.com https://storage.googleapis.com https://*.storage.googleapis.com https://*.googleusercontent.com; media-src 'self' blob: https://*.pushbullet.com https://*.pushbulletusercontent.com https://*.pushbulletusercontent2.com https://s3.amazonaws.com https://*.s3.amazonaws.com https://storage.googleapis.com https://*.storage.googleapis.com https://*.googleusercontent.com; connect-src https://api.pushbullet.com https://stream.pushbullet.com wss://stream.pushbullet.com https://upload.pushbullet.com https://*.pushbullet.com https://*.pushbulletusercontent.com https://*.pushbulletusercontent2.com https://s3.amazonaws.com https://*.s3.amazonaws.com https://storage.googleapis.com https://*.storage.googleapis.com https://*.googleusercontent.com
